name: Validate Artifact
description:
Validate an artifact against its type schema and the 8 quality bars. Returns validation results with specific errors and suggested fixes.

Quality Bars checked:
1. Integrity - No contradictions or dead links
2. Reachability - Critical content accessible
3. Nonlinearity - Branches matter
4. Gateways - Conditions enforceable
5. Style - Voice consistent
6. Determinism - Reproducible where promised
7. Presentation - Spoiler-safe
8. Accessibility - Navigation clear

Pattern: validate-with-feedback - strict validation, clear rejection messages with remediation guidance.

artifact_id.description: ID of the artifact to validate

artifact_data.description: The artifact content to validate (if not already persisted)

validation_mode.description: What to validate: schema compliance only, quality bars only, or both

examples.description: Validate a Section before merging to Cold
Quick schema check on a draft
